settings.title: Settings
settings.realtimeHint: All changes are applied in real-time
settings.license: Open source under GPL v3 license
settings.updateReadyMessage: Update downloaded, restart the app to complete installation
settings.updateErrorMessage: Update failed, please try again later
settings.autoSaveDesc: How often to save reading progress
settings.updaterNetworkError: Cannot connect to update server, please check network
settings.updaterNoUpdate: No updates available or service temporarily unavailable
settings.readingNotice: Font and layout settings only apply to EPUB and other reflowable formats, not PDF.
settings.volumeButtonsPageTurnDesc: While reading, volume keys turn pages
settings.followSystemFontScaleDesc: Auto-scale by the OS accessibility font size
settings.fixedLayoutNotice: PDF is a fixed layout format. Font and layout settings are not available.
settings.builtinNameReadOnly: Built-in skill names cannot be modified
settings.vm_desc: Configure embedding model for semantic search and RAG retrieval
settings.vm_modeBuiltinDesc: Download model to run locally, no API required
settings.vm_builtinDesc: Download lightweight models to run locally within the app. First download is automatically cached.
settings.vm_remoteDesc: Connect to external embedding API service
settings.vm_noRemoteModels: No remote model configurations yet. Add one to use external embedding API.
settings.vm_noModels: No vector model configurations. Add one to enable semantic search.
settings.vm_urlHint: Enter an API root, /v1 base, or full /embeddings URL. Save and test normalize it automatically.
settings.vm_model_desc_miniLM: Fast and lightweight, good general quality
settings.syncDesc: Sync reading data across devices via WebDAV
settings.syncLayoutMigrationNotice: Remote layout updated — please upgrade every syncing device to this version
settings.syncRemoteRootDesc: Choose the remote folder used only for ReadAny sync. Nested paths are supported and will be created automatically during test or first sync. ReadAny does not scan books you already placed there; import an existing WebDAV library with "Connect another WebDAV".
settings.syncIntervalDesc: When auto sync is enabled, check for updates every N minutes
settings.syncAllowInsecureDesc: Skip TLS certificate verification (for self-signed certificates)
settings.syncAllowInsecureDescMobile: Use HTTP instead of HTTPS for self-signed certificate servers
settings.syncWebdavForbidden: WebDAV access was denied. Check account permissions for this path.
settings.syncWebdavNotFound: The WebDAV address or path was not found. Check the server URL and root path.
settings.syncWebdavMethodNotAllowed: The server did not respond correctly to a WebDAV request. Make sure WebDAV is enabled.
settings.syncWebdavTimeout: WebDAV connection timed out after {{seconds}} seconds. Check the server URL, port, and network.
settings.syncWebdavNetworkError: Could not reach the WebDAV server. Check the network, URL, port, or certificate setup.
settings.syncWebdavDesktopScopeError: This desktop build has not allowed that WebDAV address yet. Update to the latest build and restart the app, then try again.
settings.syncWebdavTlsError: WebDAV TLS certificate validation failed. Check the certificate, or allow insecure connections and try again.
settings.syncForceUploadDesc: Overwrite remote database, books, and covers with this device's current data.
settings.syncForceUploadConfirm: Start a full upload? The remote database will be overwritten and matching remote books and covers will be re-uploaded.
settings.syncForceDownloadDesc: Overwrite this device's database, books, and covers with the remote copy.
settings.syncForceDownloadConfirm: Start a full download? This device's database will be overwritten and remote books and covers will be downloaded again.
settings.syncResetDesc: Clear all sync metadata. Use this if sync is having issues.
settings.syncResetConfirm: Are you sure you want to reset? This will clear all sync status and perform a full resync next time.
settings.syncDisconnectConfirm: Are you sure you want to disconnect? Data on this device will not be deleted.
settings.syncConflictDesc: Both local and remote data have changes. Choose which version to keep.
settings.syncS3RemoteRootDesc: Choose the folder prefix inside this bucket. Nested paths are supported, for example apps/readany.
settings.syncLANDescFull: Incrementally import data from another device on the same LAN, merging library changes and downloading missing books and covers.
settings.syncLANServerDesc: Share this device's data for another device to import
settings.syncLANClientDesc: Quickly import library data from another device
settings.syncLANServerHint: Open ReadAny on another device and scan this QR code or enter the pair code to import this device's data there
settings.syncLANScanHint: Align the scanner with the desktop QR code
settings.syncLANImportWarning: Connecting will incrementally import database changes from the server device and download missing books and covers instead of replacing this device wholesale. If the server has explicit deletions, those deletions will also sync over.
settings.syncLANImportBanner: This LAN import now merges changes and downloads missing files instead of replacing the whole library.
settings.syncLANExpoGoUnsupported: Expo Go does not support the LAN sender because it requires native TCP modules. Please use a custom Dev Client (expo run) or the desktop app.
settings.syncAndroidExpoGoHttpUnsupported: Android Expo Go does not support testing this plain HTTP WebDAV endpoint. Please use HTTPS, or test again in a custom Dev Client / release build.
settings.cameraPermissionDesc: Sync feature needs camera permission to scan QR code
settings.syncLANManualIPHint: Cannot auto-detect IP address. Please enter local LAN IP manually.
settings.syncLANTauriRequired: The LAN sender only works inside the Tauri desktop app. It looks like you're running the browser dev page, so please launch the desktop shell instead.
settings.noModelsFetched: Please fetch model list in AI settings first
settings.copyToken: Copy the token below and import on another device
